channel.name: engineering
channel.topic: Engineering discussions, PR reviews, architecture decisions

messages.text: Hey team, I just opened PR #42 for the auth rewrite. Can someone review?
Looks good. I left some comments on the PR. Also, this relates to issue #15 about the token refresh flow.
replies: I'll take a look at the comments, thanks!
Can we also address #18 in this PR?

messages.text: Has anyone looked at PR-56 for the rate limiter? It closes issue #23.
The migration in owner/repo#214 is complete. Kafka is now handling the event stream.
replies: Great, what was the final decision on partitioning?
We went with 12 partitions based on the load test results.

messages.text: Quick heads up: I'm about to push a change to auth.py that might affect the login flow.
Meeting notes: decided to go with OAuth2 for the new API. See ADR-17 for details.
